sourcePack.selectionStandard: approved-subset-only; missing art is preferred to bad art

missingRuntimeRoles.notes: The curated 37 selected assets did not include transparent forest sprites.

missingRuntimeRoles.role: mountain and snow mountain overlay sprites
missingRuntimeRoles.notes: The curated 37 selected assets did not include transparent mountain sprites.
Town, port, cave, shrine, ruins, tower, gate, final, treasure, resource, merchant, and shipwreck icons are generated placeholders.
Roads and rivers stay procedural styled strokes. Dock/bridge sprites use explicit current-folder placeholders.

assets.visualRationale: Generated in-repo placeholder because the curated selected pack contains terrain fills only.
assets.notes: Replace with approved selected art when available. This avoids falling back to deprecated atlas art.

assets.visualRationale: Algae bog has small algae rings and green wet-surface identity without a single pond silhouette.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Pale sand has gentle wave texture and no beach-to-water edge, matching mask-rendered coast use.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Black ash changed to a flatter dark ash surface with better repeat behavior.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Updated after 3x3 tileability review. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Brown stone ground is warm and irregular without masonry or wall geometry.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Bright coral-white sand keeps a tropical tint without red artifacts or object marks.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dark basalt has clean chunky stone texture without lava edges or wall forms.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dark cave stone is ground-like and avoids stalactite, cave-mouth, and border cells.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dark forest dirt is a pure dark soil swatch selected over foliage-edge alternatives.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dark magical water has deep purple-blue energy while remaining a repeatable full surface.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dead leaves form a dense full-surface leaf litter swatch without tree objects.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Deep ocean has dark readable wave texture without land, coast, or route geometry.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Flat desert sand is low-clutter and broad enough for large semantic masks.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dry deadland dirt has cracked barren texture and avoids shrubs or lava cells.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dry yellow-green grass has restrained color and improved repeat behavior for broad warm-land patches.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Updated after 3x3 tileability review. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Ember cracks are visible but controlled, working as a hot ground material.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Dark soil is rich, repeatable, and free of roots, crop rows, or border artifacts.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Fine gravel has small even stone grain and no large loose-object rocks.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Freshwater changed to a cleaner river-friendly ripple surface so future procedural rivers have a better fill source.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Updated after 3x3 tileability review. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Glowing magma changed to a bright magma cell with less obvious edge mismatch than the first-pass pick.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Updated after 3x3 tileability review. High-contrast magma will always show some repetition; suitable for hazardous masks and local pools. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Balanced open green grass with fine texture, readable as a starter-island fill and free of flowers, paths, or object shapes.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Grey irregular stone reads as ground, selected over brick-wall candidates.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Purple mire is a pure cursed-ground swatch without reeds, trunks, or pond geometry.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Highland grass includes small stone flecks while keeping a reusable grassy base texture.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Lava crust changed to a lower-seam crust pattern while keeping dark plates over heat cracks.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Updated after 3x3 tileability review. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Scree texture uses small loose stone grain instead of mountain peak sprites.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Natural dirt has small grain and pebble detail without borders or path shapes.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Normal ocean uses lively mid-blue water texture with cleaner tiled behavior than the flat gradient candidate.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Obsidian volcanic ground is dark and angular with no baked volcano sprite or border.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Packed dirt avoids the baked rectangular frames present in many same-slot candidates.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Red sand has warm readable texture with fewer large directional streaks than stronger alternatives.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Reef-blue water has subtle reef-like color texture without islands or shore edges.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Scorched dirt has smoky burn variation with small ember hints and no major crater object.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Shallow coastal water changed to a land-free pale cyan fill with very clean tiling; coastline shape remains renderer-driven.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Updated after 3x3 tileability review. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Clean white snow is nearly seamless and low-noise for broad snow masks.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Soft meadow green with sparse small flower flecks and no route or object shapes.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Turquoise water is vibrant, tropical, and free of shoreline geometry.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.

assets.visualRationale: Warm sand texture is readable and less noisy than several stronger dune alternatives.
assets.notes: Same-slot visual selection from JPEG candidate; converted to PNG without color correction. Approved after subset review: pure material, renderer-useful, and acceptable in 3x3 tileability preview.
